name: Pink Marble
description: Exquisite Pink Marble with striking natural veining, sourced directly from the heart of Rajasthan. This premium stone features a soft blush hue accented by deep charcoal and ochre streaks, creating a timeless and luxurious aesthetic perfect for high-end interiors.

name: Green Marble
description: Stunning Green Marble with deep emerald tones and elegant white veining. Sourced from the finest quarries in Madhya Pradesh, this durable stone brings a touch of nature and sophistication to any interior or exterior space.

name: White Marble
description: Classic White Marble from the pristine heart of Rajasthan. Known for its brilliant clarity and subtle grey veining, this premium stone offers a clean, bright, and luxurious finish perfect for floors, bathrooms, and elegant living areas.

name: Red Granite
description: A vibrant and durable stone with rich crimson tones and consistent grain, perfect for bold interior statements and high-traffic areas.

name: Galaxy Black
description: Striking black granite featuring distinct gold and silver crystalline flecks that resemble a starry night sky, offering a luxurious and deep aesthetic.

name: R Black

name: Black Granite
description: The classic choice for durability and elegance. A timeless black stone that provides a solid, professional, and lasting finish.
